name: release-blockers-and-automated-reports
title: 修复发布阻断与自动报告
description: 修复 manifest 资产矩阵、detached 签名、公钥发布与 macOS 官方签名阻断，并自动生成中英文 release note 和本次测试 summary。
creator: TalexDreamSoul
notes: Code, workflow, bilingual notes, automated summary, RSA-4096 signing-key rotation, offline official-build attestation, and the four-source trust-root drift gate are implemented and locally verified. RELEASE_SIGNING_PRIVATE_KEY is configured in GitHub Actions; CoreApp/Nexus PEMs and the Cloudflare fallback pin fingerprint a340b58cff2413f11c64b406fa745e76910759d19a211b72d176686b021fb2ed, and the built Nexus endpoint returned that fingerprint under Wrangler. The owner explicitly waives Apple Developer native signing until they announce it is configured; workflow mode remains waived and must preserve that risk in evidence. A new tag build is the next operational step.
